report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v2: 451 uncommitted files (+16 from earlier EOD), Day 7 without deploy. 1,237 page.tsx on disk, 589 published slugs, 103 missing page.tsx (stable). 147 TS errors unchanged. All 6 API routes code-healthy. Deploy remains singular P0 blocker.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,237 page.tsx files on disk (+2 from earlier EOD cycle). 589 unique published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
103 published slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged from last cycle. Gaps in wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, learn/*, blog/*.
147 TypeScript errors — STABLE. All non-blocking: 6 learn page JSX issues + structured-data.examples.ts syntax. No new regressions.
31 modified tracked files in working tree. 420 untracked files (new pages, reports, assets).
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 on degen0x.com. Local code audit clean, no new build-breaking patterns.
No new page.tsx deletions or structural regressions detected since last cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and properly configured: prices (60s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), trending (300s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL), defi-yields (300s TTL).
All routes implement in-memory caching + Cache-Control headers with stale-while-revalidate. No code changes to data layer since Mar 14.
Fallback coverage: 5/6 routes have stale-cache or static fallback. defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure — no stale fallback (minor gap, unchanged).
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key). 4 of 6 core routes hit CoinGecko. Rate limit risk persists on cold-cache bursts.
7 supporting routes also healthy: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe.
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live API response times or data freshness from sandbox.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — 7 days stale. Longest deploy gap since project inception.
451 uncommitted files: 420 untracked + 31 modified. Working tree: 1,020 insertions / 616 deletions across tracked files.
Major uncommitted changes: published-pages.ts (+163 lines), NotificationCenter.tsx refactor, learn page data updates, new OG assets.
CRITICAL: 7-day deploy gap blocks all new published slugs, learn pages, and UX fixes from production. Google cannot index any additions.
Production build expected to succeed — TS errors are non-blocking (in unimported example/legacy files).
No Vercel dashboard access from sandbox — cannot verify deployment logs or error spikes.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 16 new uncommitted files since last EOD (435→451). Incremental learn page scaffolding and report generation.
DELTA FROM LAST EOD: +16 uncommitted files, +2 page.tsx (1,235→1,237), published slugs stable, missing page.tsx stable at 103, TS errors flat at 147.
CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P0 — git commit + push (451 files, 7 days stale). P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs. P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Clear, 0 active items. 2 blocked items remain (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx).
NEEDS JEFE: Single action required — `git add -A && git commit && git push` to unblock production. Day 7 is the longest gap ever.
